title: helichrysum thianschanicum
intro: Helichrysum thianschanicum, also known as Tianshan helichrysum, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum thianschanicum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and essential oils to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
